task: user updated the README to clarify install steps after a recent rename; pure docs change

rubric.criterion: Subject under 72 chars and uses [docs] prefix (pure documentation change, no code)
Names what was clarified (install steps / rename to bin/install), not just 'update docs'
Uses git commit -m '...' -- README.md (direct, single-file pathspec)
Does not add Co-Authored-By, --amend, --no-verify, or use git add
